title: BrasketVisual
description: This mod optimizes your game’s visuals for PvP, removing distractions and highlighting what matters most
body:
![nameVisual](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47f526e5b41c103d01f6d147ceced508fb3f48e1.jpeg)
# BrasketVisual

**BrasketVisual** is a lightweight and essential visual utility for **Fabric 1.21.4**. This mod is designed to enhance your PvP experience by removing visual distractions and improving gameplay clarity.

### ⚔️ Key Features
* ☀️ **Fullbright** — Permanent high brightness. No more dark spots during combat.
* 🔥 **Low Fire** — Significantly reduces the fire overlay height to keep your vision clear.
* ☁️ **No Weather** — Disables rain and snow to maximize visibility and boost FPS.
* 📳 **No Camera Shake** — Removes screen wobbling when taking damage for better aiming.
* 🔮 **Pearl Tracker** — Helps you keep track of ender pearls for better positioning.
* 🖥️ **Custom UI** — Modern and clean interface to manage all features easily.

### 🛡️ Fair Play & Safety
* **100% Legal** — This mod only affects visuals. It does **not** include any cheats, reach modifiers, or movement exploits.
* **Client-Side** — Works on all multiplayer servers as it doesn't change game mechanics.
* **Optimized** — Built on the latest Fabric version for maximum performance.

### 🚀 Installation
* 🛠️ **Install Fabric Loader** for 1.21.4.
* 📦 **Add Fabric API** to your `mods` folder.
* 📥 **Drop BrasketVisual.jar** into the `mods` folder.
* 🎮 **Launch the game** and customize your settings!
